# FRA-BER KO IRON 750ML Cleaner & Disinfectant For Body & Wheel

https://www.gecegy.com/shop/fra-ber-ko-iron-italian-cleaner-disinfectant-for-body-wheel-750ml-5313
https://www.gecegy.com/web/image/product.template/5313/image_1920?unique=cc6d512

### Description:

FRA-BER KO IRON 750ML – Professional Iron & Rust Remover for Bodywork and Wheels
FRA-BER KO IRON is a powerful decontaminant and cleaner designed to remove ferrous residues, brake dust, and mineral deposits from all types of vehicle surfaces — including wheels, rims, and bodywork.
Its acid-free formula makes it completely safe for steel, alloy, chrome, and polished rims, while still offering high cleaning power. During use, the product changes color to purple, indicating it’s actively dissolving iron particles, rust, and embedded contaminants.
Thanks to its low-odor formulation, KO IRON provides a pleasant and safe user experience, ideal for car wash centers, detailing workshops, and professional car care services looking for top-tier results.

#### Key Features:

- Removes iron dust, rust, and mineral residues effectively

- Safe for all types of rims and painted surfaces

- Acid-free and low-odor formula for easy use

- Creates a purple visual effect when reacting with iron particles

- Perfect for professional detailing and deep wheel cleaning

#### Directions for Use:

- Ready-to-use product (750 mL).

- Spray evenly on a cool surface.

- Wait 2–5 minutes until the product reacts and turns purple (do not let it dry).

- Rinse thoroughly with water.

- For stubborn dirt, use a detailing brush.

- For bodywork decontamination, work panel by panel.

#### Warnings:

*⚠️*

- Always test on a small hidden area before full application.
- Do not apply on hot surfaces or allow the product to dry.
- Avoid contact with cast iron brake calipers.
